metadata.description: Deploy Azure AI Foundry/OpenAI account as part of this template
Foundry model/deployment name consumed by agents app
Foundry model name to deploy in the account (for example: gpt-4o-mini)
Deploy a Foundry model deployment when provisioning Foundry account
Deploy Container Apps (set false to deploy infra only before images are pushed)
ACR name (must be globally unique, alphanumeric only)
Allow Azure services to access PostgreSQL
Create a model deployment in the Foundry account
Foundry model deployment name used by the app
Deployment SKU name for the model deployment
Deployment SKU capacity for the model deployment
